name: Fresh Apple Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel apples and chop into small pieces.
2. Chop pecans into small pieces.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, salt, cinnamon, and baking soda.
4. Create a well in the center of the dry ingredients mixture.
5. Add oil and vanilla to the well; beat with eggs until combined.
6. Gently fold in apples and pecans.
7. Pour batter into a greased bundt pan (or similar).
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Turn off the oven and let cool before removing the cake from the pan.
